## Qualification
- [ ] **Reachable** — traced to a default config value and a live call path
- [ ] **Not already reported** — checked issues *and* open PRs
- [ ] **Repo maintained** — still merging PRs
- [ ] **Real, not intended** — confirmed against sibling code / tests / docs
